message:
feat(tui): add deterministic replay, evidence ledger hooks, and terminal resilience

Introduce three new TUI infrastructure modules enabling deterministic
testing, postmortem evidence collection, and graceful terminal mode
transitions. Also harden existing frame handling against edge cases.

determinism.rs (new):
- Clock trait abstraction with WallClock (real time) and TickClock
  (virtual time for test/replay) implementations
- DeterministicSeed for reproducible randomness during replay sessions
- Enables fully deterministic TUI replay without wall-clock dependence

evidence.rs (new):
- JSONL evidence hooks for replay/postmortem analysis
- Mandatory redaction of sensitive data per evidence-jsonl-v1 contract
- Integrates with the observability lint system for compliance checking

terminal.rs (new):
- Terminal mode detection (alt-screen vs inline mode)
- Graceful recovery from terminal disconnects, SIGWINCH resize bursts,
  and mode transitions
- Safe fallback rendering when terminal capabilities are degraded

frame.rs:
- Handle edge case where end_frame() is called without prior begin_frame()
- Log warning and return safe empty metrics instead of panicking
- Add test for safe noop behavior

replay.rs:
- Expand replay infrastructure (~208 new lines) integrating with Clock
  trait for deterministic playback

shell.rs:
- Expand shell rendering (~219 new lines) with overlay composition

input.rs, screen.rs, palette.rs, theme.rs, lib.rs:
- Style improvements, new module exports, and minor refactoring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
